parsedJson.summary: The site looks visually polished and premium, but the first screen underuses phone contact, proof, and service clarity for a Brisbane roofing customer ready to act.

issues.title: Mobile phone number is not visible
issues.what_observed: On the mobile screenshot, the header shows a green circular phone icon but no visible phone number next to it.
issues.why_problem: A local-search customer on their phone often wants to call immediately; if they cannot see the number before tapping, it adds doubt and friction at the exact moment they are ready to contact a roofer.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A mobile header with a visible tap-to-call button showing both the phone icon and '0498 478 739', or a sticky bottom bar with 'Call' and 'Get Quote'.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the icon-only mobile phone button with a compact tap-to-call button that displays the phone number, and keep it visible in the header or sticky bottom action bar.
issues.plain_explanation: 手机版顶部只有电话图标，没有直接显示电话号码，客户要先猜这个按钮能不能打电话。
issues.customer_impact: 本地找屋顶工的人很多是在手机上马上比较和拨号；如果电话号码不明显，客户可能直接返回 Google 选择下一个商家。即使只流失 10%-20% 的来电，也会直接减少报价机会。

issues.title: No proof points in first screen
issues.what_observed: The desktop and mobile hero areas show the headline, service sentence, and quote button, but no visible reviews, licence details, insurance mention, years in business, or completed-project count.
issues.why_problem: Roofing is a high-cost, high-trust job; a Brisbane customer comparing roofers needs quick reassurance that the company is legitimate before requesting a quote.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: The first screen includes 3-4 compact proof points such as 'QBCC licensed', 'North Brisbane based', 'Metal roofing specialists', and a visible Google rating or review count.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Add a proof strip directly under the hero headline or above the quote button with licence, insurance, local area, and review/rating signals.
issues.plain_explanation: 首屏看起来漂亮，但没有马上告诉客户“我们有资质、靠谱、别人用过并认可”。
issues.customer_impact: 屋顶工程金额高，客户通常会在几秒内判断是否可信。缺少评价、牌照和本地证明，会让一部分客户不敢提交报价，尤其是从 Google 商家资料点进来的陌生客户。

issues.title: Headline may exclude local homeowners
issues.what_observed: The main hero headline says 'Trusted by Queensland's Premium Builders' and the smaller line says the business specialises in new build roofing for builders and developers.
issues.why_problem: Someone searching 'roofer Brisbane' may be a homeowner needing repairs, replacement, or a quote; the message can make them think the company only works with builders and not with regular local customers.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A headline that clearly covers the main buying intent, such as 'Metal Roofing Specialists in North Brisbane' with service chips for new roofs, replacements, repairs, and commercial work.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Rewrite the hero to lead with local roofing service clarity, then support it with the premium builder positioning as a trust proof lower on the page.
issues.plain_explanation: 现在的主标题更像是在对建筑商说话，不像是在对普通需要屋顶服务的本地客户说话。
issues.customer_impact: 如果 Google 进来的客户以为“这家公司不接我这种活”，他们不会继续研究。服务范围不清楚会让原本有需求的人提前离开，减少询盘。

issues.title: Mobile lower button is cut off
issues.what_observed: On the mobile screenshot, the green 'GET A FREE QUOTE' button is visible, but the secondary outlined button below it is partially hidden by the diagonal white section at the bottom of the screenshot.
issues.why_problem: A partially cut-off button makes the page feel unfinished and can confuse visitors about whether there is another action they should take.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: On mobile, the primary quote button sits fully visible with comfortable spacing, and secondary actions either stack clearly below it or move lower on the page.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Adjust the mobile hero height and diagonal divider so all hero buttons are fully visible, or remove the secondary button from the mobile hero and keep one clear quote action.
issues.plain_explanation: 手机版底部有一个按钮被斜线区域切掉了，看起来像页面没有排好。
issues.customer_impact: 移动端细节出错会降低信任感。客户会把这种视觉问题联想到施工是否也不够细致，特别是屋顶这种高价服务，几秒内的不信任就可能损失一次报价。

issues.title: Desktop header feels oversized
issues.what_observed: On desktop, the top contact bar plus large white navigation area take up roughly the top quarter of the screenshot before the hero content begins.
issues.why_problem: The large header delays the main message and quote action, making the first impression feel less direct for a visitor who wants quick confirmation and contact options.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A slimmer desktop header with the logo, navigation, phone number, and quote button in one tighter band, leaving more first-screen space for service proof and CTA content.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Consolidate the contact bar and navigation into a more compact header, reduce vertical padding, and keep phone and quote actions prominent on the right.
issues.plain_explanation: 电脑版顶部导航区域占了太多高度，真正说明业务和引导报价的内容被往下推了。
issues.customer_impact: 客户进站后的前 8 秒很关键。顶部空间被导航占太多，会减少他们第一眼看到服务、信任证明和报价按钮的机会。

issues.title: Navigation labels are over-spaced
issues.what_observed: The desktop navigation uses very wide letter spacing on items like 'SERVICES', 'LOCATIONS', 'OUR PROJECTS', and 'QUOTE REQUEST'.
issues.why_problem: Over-spaced labels take longer to read, especially for older homeowners or people scanning quickly on a laptop.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Navigation labels with normal or lightly spaced text, clear word shapes, and strong contrast, while keeping the active page simple and obvious.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Reduce navigation letter spacing, use clearer label sizing, and make the main actions 'Call' and 'Get Quote' easier to recognise at a glance.
issues.plain_explanation: 导航文字字母间距太大，虽然有设计感，但不如普通文字好读。
issues.customer_impact: 客户不是来欣赏导航的，他们是在快速找服务、案例和联系方式。越难扫读，越容易让人放弃继续点击。

positive_observations: The hero photography immediately shows premium metal roofing work and supports the business category.
The green accent colour is consistent with the logo and makes the main quote button stand out.
The desktop header includes both email and phone contact, which should be preserved.
redesign_priorities: 1. Make mobile contact immediate with a visible tap-to-call phone number and sticky quote/call actions.
2. Add above-fold trust proof: licence, insurance, local area, reviews, and metal roofing specialization.
3. Rework the hero message so Brisbane homeowners and builders both understand the services offered.
